research_history_boundary.support_only_access_allowed: current and past metrics, causal feature distributions, event counts, branch counts, timestamps, and clock overlap only

novelty_boundary.distinct_axis: relative contraction and recovery of BTC-margined COIN-M contract OI versus USD-M notional OI, confirmed by the reversal of COIN-M-specific taker selling

nearest_existing_families.inventory_purge_reclaim: uses USD-M positioning only; ICDR requires a relative BTC-collateral contraction and source-only reclaim sequence
nearest_existing_families.cross_collateral_book: uses resting depth shells; ICDR uses exchange-published positioning and taker aggregates
nearest_existing_families.inferred_liquidation: uses price/OI/taker inference on USD-M; ICDR isolates the inverse-collateral cohort without price in the signal

source_contract.gap_policy: never impute; current and required lookback must be complete, then quarantine the next 24 five-minute rows

causal_feature_contract.availability: metrics row t is usable only after t and one complete additional five-minute availability bucket; all thresholds exclude t

unit_safe_open_interest.reason: USD-M notional value and COIN-M contract count are each used only through dimensionless changes; raw levels are never subtracted

taker_state.um_log: TU[t] = mean(log(um_taker_ratio[t-2:t])) over three clean bars
taker_state.cm_log: TC[t] = mean(log(cm_taker_ratio[t-2:t])) over three clean bars

causal_feature_contract.lagged_thresholds: qP(Q), qS(0.90), and qG(0.90) use only clean t-8640..t-1 values with at least 2016 observations
causal_feature_contract.setup: dC[t] < 0, P[t] >= qP(Q), S[t] >= qS(0.90), and G[t] >= qG(0.90); start only on false-to-true transition
causal_feature_contract.confirmation: within bars t+1..t+12 take the first clean row k where cm_taker_ratio[k] >= 1, cm_taker_ratio[k] >= um_taker_ratio[k], and log(cm_OI[k]/cm_OI[k-1]) >= 0
causal_feature_contract.expired_setup: no trade if no confirmation appears within 12 bars
causal_feature_contract.action: fixed LONG BTCUSDT USD-M perpetual after confirmation

support_calibration.vary_only: relative purge quantile Q in the frozen policy grid
support_calibration.selection_rule: select the highest Q passing every 2021-2022 support and novelty floor; 2023 may only pass or reject that frozen Q and cannot select a fallback
support_calibration.confirmation_rate_definition: confirmed setup episodes divided by accepted false-to-true setup episodes before position non-overlap, calculated separately in train and 2023
support_calibration.month_share_definition: largest UTC entry-month count divided by non-overlapping primary entries, calculated separately in train and 2023
support_calibration.jaccard_definition: Jaccard of primary and control non-overlapping entry timestamps, calculated separately in train and 2023
support_calibration.failure_action: reject ICDR-144 before opening any outcome; never fall back to a lower Q after the frozen train-selected Q sees 2023 support

execution_contract.decision_time: after the reclaim-confirmation metrics row is complete
execution_contract.exit: scheduled open after 144 held five-minute bars (12 hours)
execution_contract.clock_reservation: reserve each policy globally over the complete pre-2024 clock, then slice only trades whose setup, signal, entry, and exit are contained inside the requested evaluation window
execution_contract.funding: exact realized BTCUSDT settlements on [entry, exit)
execution_contract.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry high-water; entry cost; favorable-before-adverse held OHLC; exact funding; hypothetical liquidation and exit cost
execution_contract.cagr_clock: full wall-clock split including warm-up and idle cash

falsification_controls.direction_flip: same primary clock, exact SHORT side
falsification_controls.cm_only_oi: own setup clock using dC<0 and prior-Q extreme -dC instead of P, with the same S, G, and three-part CM reclaim requirements
falsification_controls.no_taker_gap: own setup clock with only the G>=prior-q90(G) clause removed and the same three-part CM reclaim
falsification_controls.no_reclaim: own clock entering two bars after the accepted primary setup onset, without scanning a confirmation window
falsification_controls.no_oi_stop: own primary setup clock whose first confirmation requires only cm_taker_ratio>=1 and cm_taker_ratio>=um_taker_ratio
falsification_controls.um_matched: own clock with dU<0, prior-Q extreme -dU, prior-q90(-TU), and the first clean confirmation where um_taker_ratio>=1 and one-bar dU>=0
falsification_controls.random_side: same primary clock with seed-20260717 Rademacher side

rejection_contract: any support or staged performance failure retires ICDR-144 without threshold, sign, unit, feature, confirmation, delay, hold, or gate repair
